name: Elayne Boosler
bio: Elayne Boosler is an American stand-up comedian and writer who was one of the few women working in stand-up in the 1970s and 80s, known for a rapid-fire observational style drawn from her life as a single woman plus topical and political material. Her 1986 self-financed special Party of One was the first hour-long comedy special by a woman to air on a cable network.

timeline.ev: Begins stand-up at The Improv in New York
Party of One airs, first hour-long cable special by a woman
Named among Rolling Stone 50 Best Stand-Up Comics of All Time

accolades: First woman with an hour-long special on a cable network (1986)
Rolling Stone 50 Best Stand-Up Comics of All Time (2017)

bits.t: Elayne Booslers First Stand-Up on Late Night
